/usr/bin/ar qc libeye_gymnastics.a CMakeFiles/eye_gymnastics.dir/eye_gymnastics_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/eye_gymnastics.dir/eye_gymnastics_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/eye_gymnastics.dir/.rcc/qmlcache/eye_gymnastics_Constants_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/eye_gymnastics.dir/.rcc/qmlcache/eye_gymnastics_DirectoryFontLoader_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/eye_gymnastics.dir/.rcc/qmlcache/eye_gymnastics_EventListModel_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/eye_gymnastics.dir/.rcc/qmlcache/eye_gymnastics_EventListSimulator_qml.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libeye_gymnastics.a
